/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/l2_runtime_validation.dir/l2/l2_runtime_validation.cpp.o  -o l2_runtime_validation  ../log_l2/liblog_l2.a ../log_agent/liblog_agent.a ../log_service/liblog_service.a ../log_writer/liblog_writer.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.5.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread
